title: Haste Potion
description: This mod adds Haste Potions to mine faster
body:
This mod adds Haste Potions to mine faster

In this mod there is :
The Potion of Haste (Haste power 20, 50 seconds)
The Potion of Haste II (Haste power 25, 1:40 minutes)
The Potion of Haste (Haste power 30, 2:30 minutes)

To craft the Potion of Haste :
1-Use a brewing stand and add sugar on water bottles
2-Once the water bottles do Mundane Potions, add a new sugar
3-And this will make the Potion of Haste

To craft the Potion of Haste II :
1-Repeat the step 1, 2 and 3 to craft the Potion of Haste
2-Add a sugar
3-And this will make the Potion of Haste II

To craft the Potion of Haste III :
1-Repeat the step 1 to craft the Potion of Haste II
2-Add a sugar
3-And this will make the Potion of Haste III

Only the Potion of Haste will allow you to one shot everything with at least ntehrite tools

I hope you will enjoy the mod :)
